attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.ASSEMBLY_ITEM_ID, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.ALTERNATE_BOM_DESIGNATOR, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.COMMON_ASSEMBLY_ITEM_ID, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.SPECIFIC_ASSEMBLY_COMMENT, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.PENDING_FROM_ECN, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.ASSEMBLY_TYPE, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.COMMON_BILL_SEQUENCE_ID, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.BILL_SEQUENCE_ID, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.COMMON_ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.NEXT_EXPLODE_DATE, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.PROJECT_ID, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.TASK_ID, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_REFERENCE, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.STRUCTURE_TYPE_ID, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.IMPLEMENTATION_DATE, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.OBJ_NAME, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.PK1_VALUE, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.PK2_VALUE, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.PK3_VALUE, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.PK4_VALUE, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.PK5_VALUE, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.EFFECTIVITY_CONTROL, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.IS_PREFERRED, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.SOURCE_BILL_SEQUENCE_ID, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B,
 (
 select BILL_SEQUENCE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B
 minus
 select BILL_SEQUENCE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.BILL_SEQUENCE_ID = STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.BILL_SEQUENCE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_BOM_STRUCTURES_B)
